title: Add request timing middleware
description: Create middleware in `src/middleware/request-timing.ts` that measures request duration and adds `X-Response-Time` header in milliseconds. Include integration test in `src/middleware/request-timing.test.ts` following the existing middleware factory pattern.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts - factory pattern returning object with `middleware(request: NextRequest): NextResponse`, measures responseTimeMs, sets headers on response
src/middleware/request-logger.test.ts - vitest test structure with fake timers, beforeEach/afterEach setup, makeRequest helper for creating NextRequest instances
